site.name: Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi
site.defaultDescription: Documentation for the Resource Translator GitHub Action — automated machine translation of resource files via Azure AI Translator.

search.title: Rapua ngā tuhinga
search.placeholder: Rapua ngā tuhinga, ngā wāhanga, ngā tohutohu...
search.idleHelp: Kimihia ngā tuhipānui mā te kaupapa, te hōputu kōnae, te kōwhiringa whirihoranga, te tohutao rānei. Whakamahia {up} {down} hei whakatere, {enter} whakatuwhera hoki.
search.empty: Kāore he whakautu. Whakamātauria he kupumatua kē.
search.error: Kāore te taupū rapu i te wātea i roto i te dev. Whakahaerehia tētahi hanga whakanao.

footer.taglinePrefix: He Hohenga GitHub e whakamāori aunoa ana i ō kōnae rauemi, i hangaia ki runga i te mana
footer.copyrightPrefix: I tukua i raro i te
